hero.title: Structural solutions across the vehicle
hero.lead: Scroll to explore interior, exterior, and underbody applications — engineered for lightweight performance and production readiness.

categories.label: Interior
categories.summary: Door trim, tailgate, and center-console modules.

categories.label: Exterior
categories.summary: Impact systems, ducts, and running-board applications.

categories.label: Underbody
categories.summary: Carriers, battery systems, and underfloor structures.

steps.title: Interior
steps.name: Cabin structural modules
steps.description: Explore injection-molded interior structures — door trim, tailgate lining, and center-console architectures engineered for stiffness, fit, and high-volume manufacturing.

steps.title: Interior
steps.name: Front Door
steps.description: Interior door panel for four-wheeler applications — integrated trim, armrest, speaker grille, and map pocket with multi-material molding.
steps.location: Driver-side front door — interior trim panel

steps.title: Interior
steps.name: Tail Gate
steps.description: Interior tailgate trim for four-wheeler rear closure — upper housing, handle zone, and lower insert interfaces.

steps.title: Interior
steps.name: Console Structure
steps.description: Structural center-console backbone with reinforcement ribbing, mounting points, and tunnel integration for shifter and storage.

steps.title: Interior
steps.name: Console Back Cover
steps.description: Rear console closure panel with vent slots and cubby openings — interfaces between front and rear cabin.
steps.location: Center console — rear face toward second row

steps.title: Exterior
steps.name: Body & closure systems
steps.description: Front impact, HVAC ducting, footstep, and powertrain-adjacent modules — metal-to-plastic conversion with validated crash and durability performance.

steps.title: Exterior
steps.name: Footstep
steps.description: Exterior side footstep / running board providing convenient ingress–egress and protecting lower rocker areas.
steps.location: Side sill — below doors, passenger entry zone

steps.title: Exterior
steps.name: Plenum Applique
steps.description: Lightweight plenum applique module at the cowl and windshield base — integrated styling and airflow management.
steps.location: Cowl / IP upper — base of windshield

steps.title: Exterior
steps.name: Sun Roof
steps.description: Lightweight sun roof module engineered for structural performance, sealing, and integration with the roof panel assembly.

steps.title: Underbody
steps.name: Structural underfloor assemblies
steps.description: Carrier plates, battery enclosure components, and semi-structural underbody modules for EV and ICE platforms.

steps.title: Underbody
steps.name: RR Carrier Plate
steps.description: Rear-right carrier plate with integrated mounting features and structural ribbing for rear underbody load paths.

steps.title: Underbody
steps.name: CCB Bracket
steps.description: CCB bracket at the cockpit cross-car beam — reinforced mounting for steering and dashboard module integration.
steps.location: Center underbody — dashboard / cockpit beam zone

steps.title: Underbody
steps.name: EV Frunk
steps.description: EV front trunk (frunk) structural module — lightweight underhood storage enclosure with integrated mounting and sealing interfaces.
steps.location: Front underbody — EV frunk / front storage bay

steps.title: Underbody
steps.name: Front End Structure (FES)
steps.description: Front end structure (FES) — primary front carrier frame for crash load management and front-module mounting.

steps.title: Underbody
steps.name: Battery Top Cover
steps.description: Battery top cover — sealed underfloor cover with raised sections for pack clearance and thermal management.

steps.title: Underbody
steps.name: Battery Cell Holder
steps.description: Battery cell holder — honeycomb-grid retention structure with standoffs for secure battery pack mounting.
steps.location: Center underbody — beneath battery top cover
